TestIntakeBlockedCarriesRuleFingerprint asserts every intake.blocked entry emitted by readiness has a non-empty rule_fingerprint stable across reruns with identical inputs.","coverage":"Child 1 AC1 (TestIntakeBlockedCarriesRuleFingerprint)"},{"parent_ac":"2. TestIntakeBlockedSetsOperatorOverride asserts operator_override=true on entries written when readiness skipped a downgrade because the bead was operator-promoted, and false otherwise.","coverage":"Child 2 AC1 (TestIntakeBlockedSetsOperatorOverrideTrue) and Child 2 AC2 (TestIntakeBlockedSetsOperatorOverrideFalse)"},{"parent_ac":"3. TestIntakeBlockedFingerprintDedupes asserts running readiness twice with identical inputs appends the entry only once.","coverage":"Child 1 AC2 (TestIntakeBlockedFingerprintDedupes)"},{"parent_ac":"4. TestBeadShowSurfacesFingerprintAndOverride asserts `ddx bead show` renders rule_fingerprint and operator_override for each intake.blocked entry.","coverage":"Child 3 AC1 (TestBeadShowSurfacesFingerprint) and Child 3 AC2 (TestBeadShowSurfacesOperatorOverride)"},{"parent_ac":"5. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/bead/... ./cmd/...` green.","coverage":"Child 1 AC3, Child 2 AC3, Child 3 AC3"},{"parent_ac":"6. `lefthook run pre-commit` passing.","coverage":"Child 1 AC4, Child 2 AC4, Child 3 AC4"}],"child_ids":["ddx-b5816493","ddx-3ca21378","ddx-3ee62a71"],"rationale":"Split along the three independent surfaces of the change: (1) fingerprint computation + dedup on write, (2) operator_override propagation from the sibling-guard branch, (3) rendering both new fields in `ddx bead show`. Children 1 and 2 are independent and can land in either order; Child 3 depends on both because it renders fields the other two introduce. Each child preserves the full parent NON-SCOPE list, the FEAT-010/ADR-023/td:027/td:031 governing references via labels, the dependency on the sibling implementation bead (carried by Child 2 which consumes the operator-promotion detection function), and the go test + lefthook verification gates."}
